title: Implement Kill Switch + Rollback Documentation
description: Add config-level kill switch to ChatService. When enabled, all responses return immediate abstention. Includes toggle CLI script and rollback procedure documentation.
acceptance_criteria: LaunchControlsConfig schema added to system_config.py with kill_switch_enabled + force_abstain_message
ChatService.answer() and stream_answer_sse() check kill switch at entry, before any other processing
Kill switch response uses mode='kill_switch', model='none', citations=[], Chinese message
scripts/toggle_kill_switch.py supports --enable/--disable/--status with advisory file lock
ROLLBACK_PROCEDURE.md exists in project root with step-by-step instructions
Config read failure defaults to kill_switch_enabled=False (fail-open)
MAIN_CONTRACT_MATRIX.md checked before adding mode field to chat/ask response
implementation_steps: 0. MANDATORY READS: Read all files listed in agents_compliance.mandatory_reads BEFORE any code changes
1. Check MAIN_CONTRACT_MATRIX.md for POST /api/v1/chat/ask response contract constraints
4. Add kill switch check at start of ChatService.answer() and stream_answer_sse()
7. Update frontend/src/api/types.ts with 'kill_switch' in ChatResponse mode union
10. /review: Review all changes before marking complete

agents_compliance.reason: Cross-module (services + schemas + scripts + frontend types). Adds mode to stable contract POST /api/v1/chat/ask. Not Lite Mode eligible.
contract_checks: POST /api/v1/chat/ask — response mode field gains 'kill_switch' value
MAIN_CONTRACT_MATRIX.md — verify adding mode is not expanding stable contract

brain_tasks: Check MAIN_CONTRACT_MATRIX.md for mode field constraints
Decide if kill_switch mode is additive (non-breaking) to stable contract
